basics.name: Md Nazmul Kabir Sikder
basics.label: Postdoctoral Research Associate
basics.summary: Postdoctoral Research Associate in Computer Engineering specializing in AI assurance and cybersecurity for critical infrastructure. Expert in developing robust and explainable machine learning methods for cyberattack detection in cyber-physical systems.

work.name: Commonwealth Cyber Initiative, Virginia Tech
work.summary: Conducting advanced research in AI assurance and cybersecurity for critical infrastructure. Developing robust and explainable machine learning methods for cyberattack detection in cyber-physical systems with applications in water distribution and agricultural networks.

work.name: A3 Lab & Commonwealth Cyber Initiative
work.summary: Led the development of advanced AI models for threat detection in water supply systems, improving the efficacy and explainability of real-time cyber-physical threat detection methods.
highlights: Cyber-physical Attacks Detection: Increased concealed attack detection accuracy by 25%, reduced false positives by 30%
Context-aware AI Framework: Designed context-aware AI frameworks using Temporal Fusion Transformer

work.name: Advanced Research Institute
work.summary: Developed 13 building models in SketchUp and conducted analyses to optimize the scheduling and operation of smart appliances.

work.name: BEM Controls LLC
work.summary: Developed and tested the Building Energy Management Open Source Software (BEMOSS) for IoT and smart grids.

work.name: Grameenphone Ltd.
work.summary: Led the swift deployment of Dhaka’s city-wide LTE network and developed various tools and systems to enhance network management and reliability.
highlights: Implemented DWDM and IPBH router protection systems
Developed an energy-efficient fuel generator controller

education.institution: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology

awards.title: Intelligent Water Systems Challenge Winner
awards.summary: Winner of the 2022 Intelligent Water Systems Challenge for developing AI-driven tools deployed in real-time operational settings at a major US wastewater treatment facility.

publications.name: AI Methods for Anomaly Detection in Cyber-Physical Systems: With Application to Water and Agriculture
publications.summary: PhD dissertation on AI-driven anomaly detection methods for critical infrastructure protection in water distribution and agricultural systems.

publications.name: Context-driven Deep Learning Forecasting for Wastewater Treatment Plants
publications.summary: Novel hybrid deep-learning architecture for accurate short-term forecasting in wastewater treatment operations.

publications.name: Assessing the Impact of Cyber Attacks on Water Distribution Systems: A Deep Learning Approach
publications.summary: Comprehensive evaluation of GAN models for generating realistic synthetic datasets to overcome data scarcity in water distribution systems.

publications.name: Deep H2O: Cyber attacks detection in water distribution systems using deep learning
publications.summary: Deep learning models for detecting concealed cyber attacks in water distribution systems using TGCN and HCAE approaches.

publications.name: P2O: AI-Driven Framework for Managing and Securing Wastewater Treatment Plants
publications.summary: AI framework for prediction, protection, and optimization of wastewater treatment plant operations.

publications.name: Outlier detection using AI: a survey
publications.summary: Comprehensive survey of AI techniques for outlier detection across multiple domains and applications.

publications.name: AI Assurance: Towards Trustworthy, Explainable, Safe, and Ethical AI
publications.summary: Co-authored book on AI assurance frameworks covering trustworthiness, explainability, safety, and ethical considerations.

publications.name: Model-Agnostic Scoring Methods for Artificial Intelligence Assurance
publications.summary: Two model-agnostic AIA pipelines for scoring explainability, safety, and security across domains.

publications.name: The application of artificial intelligence assurance in precision farming and agricultural economics
publications.summary: AI2Farm model providing predictions and guidance for agricultural decision-making during conventional and unconventional times.

publications.name: Realtime management of wastewater treatment plants using AI
publications.summary: Real-time AI-driven decision support system (RADS) for cybersecurity, prediction, and optimization in wastewater treatment.

publications.name: DeepAg: Deep Learning Approach for Measuring the Effects of Outlier Events on Agricultural Production and Policy
publications.publisher: 2021 IEEE Symposium Series on Computational Intelligence
publications.summary: Deep learning framework using LSTM networks to predict commodity production considering outlier events' impact on global economy.

publications.name: Applications of machine learning for precision agriculture and smart farming
publications.summary: Comprehensive applications of machine learning techniques in precision agriculture and smart farming systems.

publications.name: Quantification of Peak Demand Reduction Potential in Commercial Buildings due to HVAC Set Point and Brightness Adjustment
publications.publisher: 2021 IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting
publications.summary: Investigation of peak demand reduction potential in commercial buildings through HVAC and lighting adjustments in microgrid environments.

publications.name: Implementation of microcontroller based Maximum Power Point Tracker (MPPT) using SEPIC converter
publications.publisher: 2015 IEEE International WIE Conference on Electrical and Computer Engineering
publications.summary: Design and implementation of an economical and compact MPPT system using SEPIC converter with Incremental Conductance method.
